question.label: Steadier finish
question.name: What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?
question.description: Closes on concrete changes that would reduce load or friction without opening new topics.

answer: The next two weeks should focus on stabilizing and reducing reactive work.

assessment.note: She names a concrete near-term focus—stabilizing and reducing reactive work—which signals some clarity and a modestly steadier path; [THREAD-DEFERRED-WINDDOWN] 'stabilizing and reducing reactive work' could be unpacked next session.

new_queue.label: Support shape
new_queue.name: What kind of support from me would actually change your week?

issues: coverage: injected growth into next question (0 touches after turn 7)

history.answer_excerpt: Feedback on communication landed, and I am still processing it.
The next two weeks should focus on stabilizing and reducing reactive work.
The push worked, but I do not want that pace to become normal.
I am less overloaded now, but my calendar is still fragmented.
A lot of energy went into firefighting and context switching.
I can ship quickly, but I do not always feel the impact is visible.
Feedback on communication landed, and I am still processing it.
I want more room to lead cross-functional discussions earlier.
